mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.status, c.created_at, COALESCE(like_stats.like_count, 0) as like_cnt, c.at_users,
-- 用户信息 u.id as user_id, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar_url as user_avatar_url, u.gender as user_gender, u.campus_id as user_campus_id, ca.name as user_campus_name, u.is_real_name as user_is_real_name, u.created_at as user_created_at,
-- 当前用户点赞状态 CASE WHEN user_like.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as is_liked
FROM comments c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id
-- 点赞统计 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT item_id, COUNT(*) as like_count FROM likes WHERE item_type = 'COMMENT' GROUP BY item_id ) like_stats ON c.id = like_stats.item_id
-- 当前用户点赞状态（始终JOIN，但条件性过滤） LEFT JOIN likes user_like ON c.id = user_like.item_id AND user_like.item_type = 'COMMENT'
AND user_like.user_id = #{currentUserId}
AND 1 = 0
left join campuses ca on u.campus_id = ca.id
WHERE c.item_id = #{postId} AND c.item_type = 'POST' AND c.parent_id = 0 AND c.status = 'VISIBLE'
ORDER BY COALESCE(like_stats.like_count, 0) DESC, c.created_at DESC
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.status, c.created_at, COALESCE(like_stats.like_count, 0) as like_cnt, c.at_users,
-- 用户信息 u.id as user_id, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar_url as user_avatar_url, u.gender as user_gender, u.campus_id as user_campus_id, ca.name as user_campus_name, u.is_real_name as user_is_real_name, u.created_at as user_created_at,
-- 当前用户点赞状态 CASE WHEN user_like.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as is_liked
FROM comments c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id
-- 点赞统计 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT item_id, COUNT(*) as like_count FROM likes WHERE item_type = 'COMMENT' GROUP BY item_id ) like_stats ON c.id = like_stats.item_id
-- 当前用户点赞状态（始终JOIN，但条件性过滤） LEFT JOIN likes user_like ON c.id = user_like.item_id AND user_like.item_type = 'COMMENT'
AND user_like.user_id = #{currentUserId}
AND 1 = 0
left join campuses ca on u.campus_id = ca.id
WHERE c.parent_id IN
#{parentId}
AND c.status = 'VISIBLE' ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
